macro_drivers: USD/MYR exchange rate — glove exporters earn in USD; strong USD = higher RM revenue
Global demand/supply cycle — ASP sensitive to inventory glut vs shortage
Nitrile & raw material cost — rising input cost compresses gross margin
red_flags: Global supply glut suppressing average selling price (ASP)
Weak USD/MYR reducing ringgit-denominated export revenue
Sustained nitrile price spike compressing gross margin below 20%
